title: A Minuet Of Mozart's
content:
Across the dimly lighted room
The violin drew wefts of sound,
Airily they wove and wound
And glimmered gold against the gloom.

I watched the music turn to light,
But at the pausing of the bow,
The web was broken and the glow
Was drowned within the wave of night.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Sara Teasdale delivers a powerful performance in "A Minuet Of Mozart's"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
